src: macOS development environment setup:  Easy-to-understand instructions with automated setup scripts for developer tools like Vim, Sublime Text, Bash, iTerm, Python data analysis, Spark, Hadoop MapReduce, AWS, Heroku, JavaScript web development, Android development, common data stores, and dev-based OS X defaults.
ja: macOS開発環境セットアップ: Vim、Sublime Text、Bash、iTerm、Pythonデータ分析、Spark、Hadoop MapReduce、AWS、Heroku、JavaScriptウェブ開発、Android開発、主要データストア、開発者向けOS X設定の自動化スクリプト付きわかりやすい手順書
